languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, смею обратить ваше внимание на то, что сей ученый муж обладает редчайшим сочетанием навыков и практически наверняка сведущ в создании благословенных аугментов. Это настоящий подарок для флагмана и вас лично!"

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, смею обратить ваше внимание на то, что сей ученый муж обладает редчайшим сочетанием навыков и практически наверняка сведущ в создании благословенных аугментов. Это настоящий подарок для флагмана и вас лично!"

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, смею обратить ваше внимание на то, что сей ученый муж обладает редчайшим сочетанием навыков и практически наверняка сведущ в создании благословенных аугментов. Это настоящий подарок для флагмана и вас лично!"

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"

"Lord Captain, if I may be so bold as to remind you, rituals of this level are precisely what the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica require. That includes the inactive implantation throne. This is a true boon for the flagship!"

languages.text: 「艦長、僭越ながらお伝えしますが、このレベルの儀式こそが、セクター・ビオニカの聖なる機械が求めているものです。不活性化された植入式王座も含まれます。これは、我々の医療室にとって、本当に素晴らしい贈り物です！」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, if I may be so bold as to remind you, rituals of this level are precisely what the sacred machines in the Sector Bionica require. That includes the inactive implantation throne. This is a real gift to our medbay!"

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、僭越ながらお伝えしますが、このレベルの儀式こそが、セクター・ビオニカの聖なる機械が求めているものです。不活性化された植入式王座も含まれます。これは、我々の医療室にとって、本当に素晴らしい贈り物です！」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, si me permite la interrupción, me gustaría señalar que este erudito posee una combinación de habilidades muy particular y está prácticamente asegurado que sea capaz de crear aumentos benditos. ¡Es un verdadero regalo, tanto para la nave insignia como para usted a nivel personal!».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, si me permite la interrupción, me gustaría señalar que este erudito posee una combinación de habilidades muy particular y está prácticamente asegurado que sea capaz de crear aumentos benditos. ¡Es un verdadero regalo, tanto para la nave insignia como para usted a nivel personal!».

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, erlaubt mir, darauf hinzuweisen, dass dieser gelehrte Mann über eine seltene Kombination von Fähigkeiten verfügt und hinsichtlich der Herstellung gesegneter Augmentationen mit ziemlicher Sicherheit sehr versiert ist. Das ist ein wahrer Segen für das Flaggschiff und Euch persönlich!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, erlaubt mir, darauf hinzuweisen, dass dieser gelehrte Mann über eine seltene Kombination von Fähigkeiten verfügt und hinsichtlich der Herstellung gesegneter Augmentationen mit ziemlicher Sicherheit sehr versiert ist. Das ist ein wahrer Segen für das Flaggschiff und Euch persönlich!"

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, permettez-moi de souligner qu'il s'agit d'un érudit possédant des compétences rares, et dont le talent pour créer des augmentations bénies n'est plus à démontrer. Il sera un véritable atout pour le vaisseau amiral et pour vous-même ! »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, permettez-moi de souligner qu'il s'agit d'un érudit possédant des compétences rares, et dont le talent pour créer des augmentations bénies n'est plus à démontrer. Il sera un véritable atout pour le vaisseau amiral et pour vous-même ! »

languages.text: “大人，恕我斗胆进言，这位博学之士身兼多种罕见才能，可以说必定精通神圣植入物的制造。这对旗舰、对您本人来说，都是不可多得的幸事！”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"

traits.locale_text: “大人，恕我斗胆进言，这位博学之士身兼多种罕见才能，可以说必定精通神圣植入物的制造。这对旗舰、对您本人来说，都是不可多得的幸事！”

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, bu bilge adamın nadir bir beceri kombinasyonuna sahip olduğunu ve kutsal ogmentlerin yaratılmasında neredeyse kesinlikle yetkin olduğunu belirtme cüretinde bulunmaktayım ki bu, sancak gemisi ve bizzat sizin için gerçek bir lütuftur!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, if I may be so bold as to point out that this learned man possesses a rare combination of skills and is almost certainly proficient in the creation of blessed augments. This is a true boon for the flagship and you personally!"
